title: astus tetragonus
intro: Astus tetragonus, also known as the four-angled astus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Astus tetragonus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
